HeroSection.description: A bilingual learning platform for algorithms and problem-solving. Available in Arabic & English with AI-powered guidance.

FeaturesSection.title: Everything You Need to
FeaturesSection.description: Our platform combines cutting-edge AI, bilingual support, and professional tools to give you the best algorithmic learning experience.

aiAssistant.title: AI-Powered Assistant
aiAssistant.description: Get step-by-step algorithm explanations from our AI chatbot. Understand complex concepts through interactive dialogue.

bilingual.title: Bilingual Learning
bilingual.description: Full Arabic and English support with RTL layout. Learn algorithms in the language you are most comfortable with.

editor.title: Real Code Editor
editor.description: Write, run, and debug code in a Monaco-style editor. Support for multiple languages with real-time execution.

ProblemsSection.title: Practice Real
ProblemsSection.description: Browse through our curated collection of algorithmic problems, each with detailed explanations available in both Arabic and English.

HowItWorksSection.title: Start Learning in
HowItWorksSection.description: Our streamlined process gets you from problem selection to solution mastery as quickly as possible.

step1.title: Choose a Problem
step1.description: Browse our curated library of algorithmic challenges. Filter by difficulty, topic, or language preference.

step2.title: Write Your Solution
step2.description: Use our integrated code editor to write your solution in your preferred programming language. Run tests instantly.

step3.title: Get AI Feedback
step3.description: Receive detailed, personalized feedback from our AI assistant. Get hints, explanations, and optimization suggestions.

CTASection.title: Ready to Start Your
CTASection.description: Join hundreds of learners mastering algorithms with AI-powered guidance. Available in Arabic and English, 24/7.
CTASection.noCreditCard: No credit card required · Free forever · Start solving in seconds

Footer.description: A bilingual algorithms education platform with AI-powered learning assistance.
